response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and some leadership experience, there are critical gaps in core requirements. The resume shows approximately 1 year of C++ experience against an 8-year requirement, minimal large-scale distributed systems leadership, and no substantial production cloud architecture experience. The recent career focus has been on full-stack product development rather than infrastructure or platform engineering.
strengths: Demonstrates software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and mentoring through workshops and open-source leadership
Extensive full-stack technical experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS) shows adaptability and depth
Bachelor's in Computer Science with strong communication skills evidenced by teaching, talks, and community contributions
concerns: Critical gap: ~1 year C++ experience versus 8-year requirement; recent 4+ years focused on TypeScript/Node.js product work
No demonstrated experience leading large-scale infrastructure, distributed systems, or cloud platforms at production scale
Limited evidence of technical leadership scope managing platform/infrastructure teams or owning major architectural initiatives
